steps.title: Compare the two elevations
steps.content: The first sentence says the snowpack was deepest in early March at lower elevations. The next sentence shifts to higher elevations, where the snowpack was deepest in mid-March. The relationship is contrast, since the timing differs between the two elevation levels.

steps.title: Pick the contrast signal
steps.content: Choice A signals a restatement, Choice B signals an example, and Choice D signals a summary. None of those fits a shift from lower-elevation timing to different higher-elevation timing. A contrast transition is needed. The answer is C.
